message:
chore: add ephemeral debug output files to .gitignore

Ignore *.txt and *.py at repo root — agent-generated debug output,
test logs, and one-off scripts that should not be tracked.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -117,3 +117,7 @@ storage.sqlite3-wal.corrupt-*
 .beads/recovery_*/
 .beads/recovery_snapshot_*/
 .beads_snapshot_*/
+
+# Ephemeral debug output files at repo root
+/*.txt
+/*.py
